news.t: Tradr Launches SMQ, the First Monthly Reset Inverse ETF Tracking Invesco QQQ®
Tradr ETFs Transforms Leveraged Trading by Launching Industry's First Monthly and Weekly Reset ETFs

overview.description: The Tradr 2X Long Innovation 100 Monthly ETF (MQQQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking to provide 2x the exposure to the monthly price return of the Invesco QQQ Trust (ticker: QQQ-US) through swap agreements with major global financial institutions. MQQQ was launched on Sep 3, 2024 and is issued by Tradr.

data.title: Tradr Launches SMQ, the First Monthly Reset Inverse ETF Tracking Invesco QQQ®
data.text: SMQ seeks -100% of the calendar month performance of Invesco QQQ®, complementing Tradr's 2X long monthly reset ETF, MQQQ NEW YORK , Dec. 1, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Tradr ETFs, a provider of ETFs designed...

data.title: Tradr ETFs Transforms Leveraged Trading by Launching Industry's First Monthly and Weekly Reset ETFs
data.text: Eight new ETFs mark the advent of "Calendar Reset Leveraged ETFs," trading products designed to overcome the volatility drag dilemma faced by daily reset ETF investors NEW YORK , Sept. 3, 2024 /PRNews...
